views.name: enhanced_list_view
views.description: DISABLED - Phase 2: Enhanced list view disabled to reduce view count

template.content: Enhanced list view for {{modelName}} with advanced filtering and search

views.name: master_detail_view
views.description: DISABLED - Phase 2: master_detail view type not supported

template.content:
{{modelName}}MasterDetailView:
  type: master_detail
  model: {{modelName}}
  models: 
    - {{modelName}}
    {{#each relationships.childRelationships}}
    - {{targetModel}}
    {{/each}}
  description: "Master-detail view showing {{modelName}} with related entities"
  subscribes:
    - {{modelName}}Updated
    {{#each relationships.childRelationships}}
    - {{targetModel}}Created
    - {{targetModel}}Updated
    - {{targetModel}}Deleted
    - {{targetModel}}AddedTo{{../modelName}}
    - {{targetModel}}RemovedFrom{{../modelName}}
    {{/each}}
  uiComponents:
    - type: MasterPane
      properties:
        name: masterPane
        model: {{modelName}}
        displayMode: detail
        resizable: true
        minWidth: 300
        defaultWidth: 400
        showActions: true
        actions:
          - name: edit
            label: Edit {{modelName}}
            icon: edit
          - name: delete
            label: Delete {{modelName}}
            icon: trash
            confirmationRequired: true
          {{#if model.lifecycle}}
          - name: changeState
            label: Change State
            icon: workflow
          {{/if}}
    
    {{#each relationships.childRelationships}}
    - type: DetailPane
      properties:
        name: {{targetModel.toLowerCase}}DetailPane
        title: "{{pluralize targetModel}}"
        model: {{targetModel}}
        parentModel: {{../modelName}}
        relationshipType: {{type}}
        relationshipFilter: "{{../modelName.toLowerCase}}Id = {{{../modelName}}.id}"
        allowCreate: true
        allowEdit: true
        allowDelete: {{#unless cascadeDelete}}true{{else}}false{{/unless}}
        showRelationshipActions: true
        pagination:
          enabled: true
          pageSize: 10
        sorting:
          enabled: true
          defaultSort: "createdAt desc"
        components:
          - type: RelatedEntityList
            properties:
              displayMode: compact
              showQuickActions: true
              allowInlineEdit: true
    {{/each}}

views.name: analytics_view
views.description: DISABLED - Phase 2: Analytics view disabled to reduce view count

views.name: profile_aware_form_view
views.description: Form view with profile attachment support

views.name: workflow_view
views.description: DISABLED - Phase 2: Workflow view disabled to reduce view count

template.content:
{{modelName}}WorkflowView:
  type: detail
  model: {{modelName}}
  description: "Workflow management view for {{modelName}} lifecycle"
  subscribes:
    - {{modelName}}Updated
    - {{modelName}}Evolved
    {{#each model.lifecycle.transitions}}
    - {{../modelName}}{{name}}
    {{/each}}
  uiComponents:
    - type: WorkflowHeader
      properties:
        name: workflowHeader
        model: {{modelName}}
        showCurrentState: true
        showProgressIndicator: true
    
    - type: WorkflowVisualization
      properties:
        name: workflowDiagram
        model: {{modelName}}
        lifecycle: {{model.lifecycle.name}}
        states:
          {{#each model.lifecycle.states}}
          - name: {{this}}
            label: "{{humanize this}}"
          {{/each}}
        transitions:
          {{#each model.lifecycle.transitions}}
          - name: {{name}}
            from: {{from}}
            to: {{to}}
            label: "{{humanize name}}"
          {{/each}}
        highlightCurrentState: true
        showTransitionConditions: true
        interactive: true
    
    - type: AvailableTransitions
      properties:
        name: availableTransitions
        title: "Available Actions"
        model: {{modelName}}
        lifecycle: {{model.lifecycle.name}}
        showConditions: true
        showPrerequisites: true
        confirmationRequired: true
    
    - type: StateHistory
      properties:
        name: stateHistory
        title: "State Change History"
        model: {{modelName}}
        showTimeline: true
        showDetails: true
        showDuration: true
        pagination:
          enabled: true
          pageSize: 20
    
    - type: WorkflowMetrics
      properties:
        name: workflowMetrics
        title: "Workflow Metrics"
        model: {{modelName}}
        metrics:
          - name: averageTimeInState
            label: "Average Time per State"
            type: duration
          - name: transitionSuccess
            label: "Transition Success Rate"
            type: percentage
          - name: bottleneckStates
            label: "Bottleneck States"
            type: list
